query: What are the key papers on reinforcement learning from human feedback that led to ChatGPT?

entities: Deep Reinforcement Learning from Human Preferences
Training Language Models to Follow Instructions

claims.text: RLHF was introduced in the paper Deep Reinforcement Learning from Human Preferences by Christiano et al.
claims.entity: Deep Reinforcement Learning from Human Preferences

claims.text: InstructGPT applied RLHF to language models in Training Language Models to Follow Instructions
claims.entity: Training Language Models to Follow Instructions

claims.text: ChatGPT was built on InstructGPT technology
PPO is the reinforcement learning algorithm used in RLHF
Constitutional AI was introduced by Anthropic as an alternative to RLHF
Direct Preference Optimization simplifies RLHF by eliminating the reward model
RLHF uses human preferences to train a reward model
InstructGPT was trained with RLHF to follow instructions

ground_truth.description: Academic survey benchmark: trace the lineage of RLHF research leading to ChatGPT
